creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: sunpoet

Log:
  Update to 2.3.8

  - Move BROKEN_* upward
  - Move USES upward
  - Remove no-op MLINKS and create symlinks for manpages
  - Sort INSTALLED_SCRIPTS
  - Regenerate patch files with makepatch:
